title: 有馬記念の後に・情熱を世界に！

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Gracias, Divinaaa!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... El...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: El... Phew!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And the Arima Kinen is over! No one could keep
up! No one could catch her!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa has secured a sweeping victory on
powerful wings! Today, the world has witnessed
the birth of a phoenix!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In this moment, the talents of the world's
strongest finally reach their true potential.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Trainer!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Bueno! Bueno...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Sob!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I... did it... It's not just words anymore. I'm the
world's... strong—

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Waaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I rush to her side to help her calm down. After
giving the race her all, she can't control her
emotions.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Later, at the awards ceremony...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
And with this, our fierce battle, our final
confrontation—it all ends here!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
We've reached the last big race of the year, and
I'm the winnerrr!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Also, I wasn't crying. Maybe it looked like it, but I
totally wasn't!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I just had dirt in my mask! Right, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I said, right, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Hahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I give in to the pressure. She seems a bit worried
about crying in front of the audience.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Well, now that I won, I'm going abroad, just as
promised.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I wanna put the strength that I've honed with Spe
and Grass to good use.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
But power isn't the only thing I'm bringing to the
world.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Did everyone have a good time today?!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Are you fired up?!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Bueno! This kind of excitement and enthusiasm
can't be made with only strength!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
This Arima Kinen was born from friends who
competed and grew together—friends who
support each other, yet don't hold back when it's
time to fight...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
And alongside the fans who came to watch their
saga play out, they created a truly passionate
battle!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
So now, I'm gonna bring this passion to the whole
world!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
There won't be a single boring race, lap, or even
second!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: We Umamusume will run and entertain the world!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
A certain wrestler once said, "Power isn't
justice—justice is power."

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
To which I say this! The world's strongest racer
isn't the best in the world...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
The best in the world is the world's strongest
racer!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, Grass. Thank you, Spe. Thank you,
everyone!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Now, I'm gonna work hard with my trainer to take
the world by storm and get everyone across it
calling my name!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Isn't El amazing, Grass? She's...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Grass, what's wrong?!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Nothing. I just...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I'm going to miss her is all...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: El! El! El!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The endless calls of the crowd echo through the
air as the sun sets on Nakayama Racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Not only did El Condor Pasa win, but she put on
an incredible race for all of her fans.
